accessible descr: The app is available on Windows, Linux and  MacOS.Networks can be made of a few people on a local network, to thousands of people around the globe !
Secure descr: Communications are encrypted, by design, from end-to-end, with worldwide-adopted encryption standards.
Decentralized descr: Inspired of blockchains and fully decentralized, the network is the property of nobody (not even us !) Anybody can create a network to discuss with their friends, their family, colleagues, or anyone else really !
